title: Wyoming Articles of incorporation for a private for provision to protect  Owners, shareholders, Officers, Directors, Man…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Wyoming Articles of incorporation for a private for provision to protect  Owners, shareholders, Officers, Directors, Managers, and Employees   C-corporations

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
ARTICLES OF INCORPORATION
OF
[NAME OF CORPORATION]

We, the undersigned, hereby form a corporation under the laws of the state of Wyoming and adopt the following Articles of Incorporation:

Article I – Name and Duration

1. The name of the corporation shall be [Name of Corporation].
2. The duration of the corporation shall be perpetual.

Article II – Purpose

The purpose of the corporation is to engage in any lawful business activity for which corporations may be incorporated in the state of Wyoming.

Article III – Registered Agent and Address

The name and address of the registered agent of the corporation is:

[Name of Registered Agent]
[Address of Registered Agent]

Article IV – Authorized Capital Stock

1. The total number of shares of stock which the corporation shall have authority to issue is [Number of Shares].
2. The par value of each share of stock shall be [Par Value].
3. The authorized capital stock of the corporation shall be [Authorized Capital Stock].

Article V – Incorporators

The name and address of each incorporator are as follows:

[Name of Incorporator]
[Address of Incorporator]

Article VI – Directors

1. The number of directors constituting the initial board of directors shall be [Number of Directors].
2. The names and addresses of the persons who are to serve as the initial directors of the corporation are as follows:

[Name and Address of Director]
[Name and Address of Director]
[Name and Address of Director]
[Name and Address of Director]

Article VII – Limitation of Liability

The liability of the owners, shareholders, officers, directors, managers, and employees of the corporation is limited to the fullest extent permitted by the laws of the state of Wyoming.

Article VIII – Indemnification

The corporation shall indemnify and hold harmless any person who serves or has served as a director, officer, or employee of the corporation to the fullest extent permitted by the laws of the state of Wyoming.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the incorporators have executed these Articles of Incorporation on the dates and year first above written.

[Name of Incorporator]                               [Name of Incorporator]
[Address of Incorporator]                            [Address of Incorporator]

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
[Name of Incorporator]                               [Name of Incorporator]
[Address of Incorporator]                            [Address of Incorporator]

STATE OF WYOMING
COUNTY OF [County]

On this [Date], before me, a notary public in and for said state and county, personally appeared [Name of Incorporator], [Name of Incorporator], [Name of Incorporator], all known to me to be the persons whose names are subscribed to the foregoing instrument, and acknowledged that they executed the same for the purposes therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and affixed my official seal the day and year first above written.

[Notary Public’s Signature]
Notary Public for [State]
My commission expires: [Date]

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Acceptance of Appointment of Registered Agent

The undersigned hereby accepts the appointment as registered agent for [Name of Corporation] in accordance with the Wyoming Statutes.

[Name of Registered Agent]

[Address of Registered Agent]

DATED: [Date]

CERTIFICATE OF FILING

This is to certify that the Articles of Incorporation of [Name of Corporation] were filed in the Office of the Secretary of State of the State of Wyoming on [Date], and that the corporation is fully incorporated in accordance with the laws of the State of Wyoming.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and affixed the seal of the Office of the Secretary of State, in the City of Cheyenne, this [Date] day of [Month], [Year].

[Secretary of State’s Signature]

Secretary of State, State of Wyoming
